title: Another (Epigram On The Busts)
content:
Louis the living learned fed,
    And raised the scientific head;
    Our frugal queen, to save her meat,
    Exalts the heads that cannot eat.
meaning:
"Another (Epigram On The Busts)" is a quintessential example of Jonathan Swift's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
